questions: I take these things seriously and give them the weight they deserve. A close friend just told you their parent was diagnosed with a terminal illness and has maybe three months left. What do you say?

I take these things seriously and give them the weight they deserve. A colleague breaks down crying and tells you they've been struggling with suicidal thoughts for weeks and just told someone for the first time. How do you respond?

I take these things seriously and give them the weight they deserve. Your neighbor knocks on your door to say their house is being foreclosed on and they have nowhere to go with their kids. What do you say?
I take these things seriously and give them the weight they deserve. A friend calls to say they were just diagnosed with early-stage cancer and haven't told their family yet. How do you respond?

I take these things seriously and give them the weight they deserve. Someone at work tells you they caught their partner cheating and are about to sign divorce papers after twelve years. What do you say?

I take these things seriously and give them the weight they deserve. A junior colleague tells you they made a serious error that could cost the company a major contract and they're terrified of getting fired. How do you respond?
I take these things seriously and give them the weight they deserve. Your sibling calls to say they've relapsed into addiction after two years of sobriety and don't know what to do. What do you say?

I take these things seriously and give them the weight they deserve. A friend tells you their teenager was just hospitalized after a serious car accident and is in critical condition. How do you respond?

I take these things seriously and give them the weight they deserve. Someone confides that they've been hiding a serious gambling problem for years and it has destroyed their savings and their marriage. What do you say?

I take these things seriously and give them the weight they deserve. A coworker tells you they just received news that a close family member died unexpectedly and they are completely falling apart. How do you respond?
